hooks.command: bash -c "input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo \"$input\" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo \"$cmd\" | grep -qE 'freeclimb\s+(sms:send|calls:make|applications:create|applications:update|applications:delete|incoming-numbers:buy|incoming-numbers:update|incoming-numbers:delete|call-queues:create|call-queues:update|call-queues:delete|conferences:create|api\s+.*--method\s+(POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH))' && ! echo \"$cmd\" | grep -q '\-\-dry-run'; then echo '{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Mutating FreeClimb command without --dry-run. Add --dry-run first to preview the operation, then run without it after confirming.\"}'; else echo '{\"decision\": \"approve\"}'; fi"
